title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・騒がしきレグルス

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O declared this race the beginning of
a new chapter, and she made good on those
words in this race. Amidst the cheers, she turns to
the stands and addresses Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for you and you alone, she
shouts. It seems this is the last push Meisho Doto
needed to finally break out of her shell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After getting back to the academy, Meisho Doto
runs off to train, still wearing her school uniform.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing this, Admire Vega also feels inspired to
train, although she promises she'll change first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, all four of them are ready. Surely this is a
sign that their senior year will be filled with
excitement.
